opinion.h: BRUNO v. PENNSYLVANIA CERTIORARI TO THE SUPREME COURT OF PENNSYLVANIA No. 205. Argued December 14, 1970 Decided January 12, 1971
opinion.p: 435 Pa. 200, 255 A.2d 519 and 257 A.2d 47, certiorari dismissed as improvidently granted.
Daniel L. Quinlan, Jr., argued the cause and filed a brief for petitioner.
Milton O. Moss argued the cause and filed a brief for respondent.
The writ of certiorari is dismissed as improvidently granted.
